no: EET core. Use RC 12.2 for game version 2.5, newest master for 2.6. Do NOT install EET_End immediately after — install all other mods first.

in.t: EET modifies BG2:EE game data irreversibly. Back up BG1:EE and BG2:EE before installing, or pass --new-pre-eet-dir / --new-eet-dir to mod_installer so it works on fresh copies and your original installs stay clean.

conflicts.reason: Not in EET compatibility.tbl — EET install will fail unless bypassed with M flag. Mod tp2 has no EET detection. Note: multiple mods reference EET compatibility constraints (KITTOMES, WMART hard; METweaks, cdtweaks partial).
Some METweaks components modify BG1 areas in ways incompatible with EET's area handling.
conflicts.theirComps: #2800 Nashkel Mines back entrance #3000 Candlekeep catacombs early

conflicts.reason: Not in EET compatibility.tbl — EET install will fail. Mod unmaintained since 2013, no EET support.
ToB-style NPCs tweak gives NPCs ToB experience levels in BG1 under EET.

dependencies.reason: Prevent Watcher's Keep statues from disappearing in case items were randomly placed on them by this mod

sum: Merges BG1:EE, SoD, BG2:EE, and ToB into a single continuous game so you play one character from Candlekeep to the Throne of Bhaal without restarting.

co.no: Optional helper: creates a desktop shortcut to the EET install. Not macOS-compatible (REQUIRE_PREDICATE blocks osx). Safe to skip.
